meta.name: Magneta — Set curve router to Magneta V2 (polygon)
meta.description: Switch MagnetaCurveFactory (0x3564406Da6475E02c359eD1d55f747299c477837) router to the freshly deployed MagnetaV2Router02 (0x7402EbE42E374120991aBDaac27F2BC0EfEC4289). After this, NEW curve tokens created via the launchpad will graduate into Magneta-owned pools (Factory 0xdbEfA1fE8A0d3b25B7D3e15e01FD617AE77B4fc8), with 0.05% protocol fee to FeeVault on every swap.
